name: perplexity
description: Search the web and generate grounded, citation-backed answers with Perplexity Sonar models

tools.name: Search Web
tools.description: Search the web with Perplexity's Search API and get ranked results

historicalSummary.omitted: full result snippets and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Create Chat Completion
tools.description: Generate a web-grounded chat completion with citations using a Sonar model

model.description: Sonar model ID: sonar, sonar-pro, sonar-reasoning-pro, or sonar-deep-research

messages.description: Chat messages, each with role (system|user|assistant) and content

search_mode.description: Search corpus: web, academic, or sec

disable_search.description: Set true to answer without web search

tools.name: Create Agent Response
tools.description: Generate a response with Perplexity's Agent API using optional web search and reasoning

model.description: Model ID or preset, e.g. fast-search, pro-search, deep-research

input.description: Input text or question for the agent

prompts.title: Research a topic
prompts.prompt: Use Perplexity to research a topic I provide and summarize the answer with its citations.

prompts.title: Search the web
prompts.prompt: Search the web with Perplexity for a query I provide and list the top results.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Perplexity API Setup

steps.title: Create a Perplexity account
steps.description: Go to https://www.perplexity.ai and sign up or sign in, then open the API section of your account settings.

steps.title: Add billing
steps.description: Add a payment method and credits in the API portal — API calls require a positive credit balance (Pro subscribers receive monthly API credits).

steps.title: Generate an API key
steps.description: In https://www.perplexity.ai/account/api/keys, click 'Generate' and copy the key. Add it to your .env file as PERPLEXITY_API_KEY=pplx-...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the Search Web tool with a simple query. A 401 means the key is invalid; a 402 means you are out of credits.

notes: Sonar chat completions and agent responses are billed per token plus per-request search fees — they cost money on every call
The Search API is billed per request and returns ranked results without LLM generation
